# Supplier / Contractor Risk Assessment

## Purpose
Evaluate supplier risks prior to selection, renewal, or contract expansion and document mitigation actions that protect business operations, data, and compliance obligations.

## Audience
Procurement Lead, Vendor Manager, Risk Manager, Legal, Security.

---

## Document Control Information
- **Supplier name:**
- **Procurement category:**
- **Assessment date:**
- **Assessment period:**
- **Assessor:**
- **Document version:**
- **Last updated:**

---

### 1.1 Scope & Objectives
- **Scope:** [Services/products covered by this assessment]
- **Business criticality:** [Critical/High/Medium/Low]
- **Decision type:** [New vendor/renewal/expansion]
- **Frameworks referenced:** [ISO 27001, SOC 2, NIST, local policy]

| Contract value | [Annual spend / TCV] |

## 4. Risk Factors & Scoring
### 4.1 Scoring Method
**Risk Score = Likelihood × Impact × Weight** (scale 1–5). Use the highest impact dimension when multiple impacts apply.

### 4.2 Risk Factor Table
| Risk Factor | Weight (%) | Likelihood (1–5) | Impact (1–5) | Weighted Score | Notes |
| --- | --- | --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Financial stability |  |  |  |  |  |
| Reputation & ethics |  |  |  |  |  |
| Performance history |  |  |  |  |  |
| Regulatory compliance |  |  |  |  |  |
| Data security & privacy |  |  |  |  |  |
| Business continuity |  |  |  |  |  |
| Subcontractor reliance |  |  |  |  |  |
| Geographic/geopolitical risk |  |  |  |  |  |

### 4.3 Risk Rating Thresholds
| Score Range | Risk Level | Action Required |
| --- | --- | --- |
| 80–100 | Critical | Executive review, immediate mitigation plan. |
| 60–79 | High | Mitigation plan within 30 days. |
| 30–59 | Medium | Mitigation plan within 90 days. |
| 1–29 | Low | Monitor and review. |

---

## Completion Checklist
- [ ] Risk factors weighted and scored.
- [ ] Overall risk rating assigned.
- [ ] Mitigation actions documented with owners and due dates.
- [ ] Contractual controls reviewed by Legal/Security.

## Acceptance Criteria
- Assessment supports supplier decision-making.
- Risk mitigations are approved and tracked.
- Ongoing monitoring cadence is defined.
